# `@qalaam/types-ts`

**AUTOGENERATED.** Do not edit `dist/` by hand — your changes will be overwritten.

TypeScript types generated from `@qalaam/schema` per ADR-0008. Source of truth lives in `../schema/schemas/`.

## Regenerate

```bash
pnpm codegen
```

CI gate: `pnpm codegen && git diff --exit-code` (fails if drift).

## Use

```ts
import type { Verse, MistakeEvent, Speaker } from '@qalaam/types-ts';
```

Or import a specific domain:

```ts
import type { Verse } from '@qalaam/types-ts/quran/Verse';
```
